query: SELECT rarity, tier, COUNT(*) as cnt, AVG(hp_bonus) as avg_hp, AVG(attack_bonus) as avg_atk, AVG(defense_bonus) as avg_def FROM game_equipment_catalog WHERE is_active = 1 GROUP BY rarity, tier ORDER BY avg_atk DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT rarity, tier, COUNT(*) as cnt, AVG(hp_bonus) as avg_hp, AVG(attack_bonus) as avg_atk, AVG(defense_bonus) as avg_def FROM game_equipment_catalog WHERE is_active = 1 GROUP BY rarity, tier ORDER BY avg_atk DESC
